feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hi, I'm looking for a version of this song that's just lost. It's not for me, it…
entry.content: Hi, I'm looking for a version of this song that's just lost. It's not for me, it's for someone I love. She told me she discovered this song on Instagram and listened to the whole song on youtube. There were three videos of that version, all official and with fewer than 100 views, but for some reason they were under the name of Doris Ray. Then one day the song and the three videos were deleted (I think that was in 2024), and she had the song downloaded but deleted it. She's been looking for it fo
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is dual booting feasible? I want to dual boot Linux and windows HOWEVER I will u…
entry.content: Is dual booting feasible? I want to dual boot Linux and windows HOWEVER I will use two separate physical drives instead of a single partitioned drive. I want to know if there are any problems I could run into with this setup. I don't mind going into BIOS and switching the boot order every time I need to swap OS.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: datacenter water usage
entry.content: Why do they use fuktons of water, is it cheaper to cool servers by just running municipal water through and dump it to sewer instead of a closed cooling loop??? Perhaps isolated as water to water cooling to not introduce outside water?

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump Reportedly Agrees To Provide Saudi Arabia With Nuclear Program
entry.content: https://www.mediaite.com/media/news /trump-reportedly-agrees-to-provide -saudi-arabia-with-nuclear-program/ President Donald Trump formally approved an agreement to provide Saudi Arabia with a civilian nuclear enrichment program, The Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday night. Citing U.S. officials familiar with the matter, the Journal reported that the arrangement, which would last 30 years, “is designed to give American companies a central role in developing Saudi Arabia’s nuclear infrastru
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3043
entry.content: >Teasing Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84231819/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: OpenAI 'accidentally' hacked HuggingFace
entry.content: Can some tech heads comment on this story is it plausible that the hack happened autonomously or is it more likely that OpenAI was doing this deliberately https://www.ft.com/content/9db74b25 -45ad-4187-b4d7-0e4d414fe41c?syn-25 a6b1a6=1 " An OpenAI “agent” discovered new vulnerabilities and hacked into start-up Hugging Face by itself, in one of the first public examples of a cyber attack by an AI system acting outside human control. The ChatGPT maker on Tuesday said the “unprecedented cyber i
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Realistically, there hasn't been much of a contest for the past 40 years. BMW ha…
entry.content: Realistically, there hasn't been much of a contest for the past 40 years. BMW has consistently outperformed Mercedes. The only Mercedes model from the last four decades that was truly on BMW's level was the 500E, which Mercedes developed in collaboration with Porsche rather than entirely on its own.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: There is no biological distinction between fear and arousal. In a survey of moun…

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Americans have a brand of crackers called Graham crackers. When they refer to it…
entry.content: Americans have a brand of crackers called Graham crackers. When they refer to it, they always use the full phrase "Graham crackers", but they pronounce it like "gram crackers" because they struggle to speak properly. And what's more, they're not even crackers, they're sweet biscuits. But they already use the word biscuit to refer to savory scones, so they've got themselves all confused!
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

I thought mind-blowing AI progress was going to make token g

My goal was to overcome you the only thing I wanted was strength so I could strike down the enemy who had killed my mother. You can't imagine the times I looked for the chance to kill you. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Sister died left me computer
entry.content: How do I renew this computer like it’s new? I don’t know anything about Apple. I don’t even know when she got it. I know I’m going to the wrong place. Yeah yeah there’s no “tits or gtfo” she died and I’m old. But I always wanted an Apple computer. I have an iPhone and that’s all I know about Apple computers. She got it for her birthday when she was first diagnosed with cancer like around 2015. That’s all I know about this computer. I want to use it to play videos for my dad. I swear I’m no larp
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8380 Red Flags Edition Previous Thread: >>84220023 F-lis…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8380 Red Flags Edition Previous Thread: >>84220023 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is this a good deal? My old pos laptop that's like 7 years old died on its ass a…
entry.content: Is this a good deal? My old pos laptop that's like 7 years old died on its ass and I need a new one. I'm not really interested in building a PC at this stage because my work is making me travel a lot more so I want something that kind of handles every day stuff including some gaming. Mostly titles like PoE 2, Warhammer Total War 3 and a few other older games that don't really need a 5070. So I was thinking of getting the slightly cheaper alternative that has an 8gb 5050 in it instead. Prices are
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Dearest Cui Sun
entry.content: Dear Cui Sun I have now lost all connections to you. In a way it is a relief. All of the hope is gone. But I fear I can never remove you from my heart. What will I do without you. I will never understand. I will never know if you left because you hated me, or because you loved me. My soul is doomed to be tortured for etermity. Now I can only pray to God. I will spend the rest of my life pursuing you. I pray that I can see you before I die an old man. I will always love you, Your Caleb
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Addicted to last.fm
entry.content: Ok imagine its 2036. Everyone has their mandatory government-issued surveillance chips and we are all hyper-intelligent to be hyper-conscientious. Aside from the obvious benefits like how there is no crime and how everyone gets to go to heaven (if we have the right to die, that is), last.fm also auto-scrobbles everything you hear whether in the mall or because it had earwormed itself into your brain. And maybe for a fully accurate listening history it’s worth giving up free will for. Does anyone
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: My 03 avalon is about to hit 260K. Should I continue to put money into keeping i…
entry.content: My 03 avalon is about to hit 260K. Should I continue to put money into keeping it going? I've taken care of it so far but eventually the seals and rubber parts are all going to fail and i feel like its a losing game at that point. Starting to get some rust holes in the wheel wells but other than that no major body issues. known issues >P/S belt squealing >bad ABS speed sensor >headlight seal cracked moisture getting inside >moderate rust on the underside makes a lot of diy wrenching difficult >E
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >ReBoot

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Start playing Deltarune expecting to laugh at Deer Rape >Actually get attached …
entry.content: >Start playing Deltarune expecting to laugh at Deer Rape >Actually get attached to the characters. >Get to the part where Susie talks to Kris about how they used to hang out as kids. >Start to miss my friend group I played pretend with and think about how much Susie and Noelle remind me of some of the girls who played with me. >Remember how they're all on opposite sides of the country now and a few are already married. This a common experience?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
